auth.description:
Inbound authentication and provider credentials, delivered as environment
variables from a Secret.

existingSecret.description: Use this existing Secret for the webhook token (and as a source for provider creds via `envFrom`) instead of rendering one.
existingSecret.title: existingSecret

existingSecretKey.description: Key in `existingSecret` holding the webhook token.
existingSecretKey.title: existingSecretKey

webhookToken.description: The global inbound webhook token (CHASKI_WEBHOOK_TOKEN). If set, it is rendered into a chart-managed Secret. Leave empty and use `existingSecret` to supply it from your own (e.g. SOPS/sealed) Secret. With neither, inbound token auth is disabled (per-route `verify` still applies).
webhookToken.title: webhookToken

auth.title: auth

config.description:
The relay's configuration. Ops/secret settings become CHASKI_* env vars; the
routes + targets become a config file mounted at `config.mountPath`.

configPath.description: Path chaski reads its config from (CHASKI_CONFIG): a single file, or a directory of `*.yaml` fragments (config.d). The default matches the rendered ConfigMap.
configPath.title: configPath

existingConfigMap.description: Mount this existing ConfigMap instead of rendering one from `routes`/`targets` (e.g. for a config.d directory of fragments). Set `configPath` to `/config` for directory mode.
existingConfigMap.title: existingConfigMap

logLevel.description: Log level (CHASKI_LOG_LEVEL): debug, info, warn, or error.
logLevel.title: logLevel

metricsEnabled.description: Expose Prometheus metrics + the /healthz probe on `metricsPort` (CHASKI_METRICS_ENABLED).
metricsEnabled.title: metricsEnabled

metricsPort.description: Metrics + health port (CHASKI_METRICS_PORT); kept off the public webhook port.
metricsPort.title: metricsPort

mountPath.description: Where the config ConfigMap is mounted.
mountPath.title: mountPath

port.description: Webhook receiver port (CHASKI_PORT); also the container/Service http port.
port.title: port

requestTimeout.description: Whole-request deadline (CHASKI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT): decode + gate + render + send + retry.
requestTimeout.title: requestTimeout

retryAttempts.description: Global default retry attempts per target (CHASKI_RETRY_ATTEMPTS); a target's `retry.attempts` overrides it.
retryAttempts.title: retryAttempts

retryBackoff.description: Global default retry base backoff (CHASKI_RETRY_BACKOFF); a target's `retry.backoff` overrides it.
retryBackoff.title: retryBackoff

routes.description: Route definitions, keyed by name (the URL path: POST /notify/{name}). Emitted verbatim into the ConfigMap — `{{ ... }}` here is chaski's CEL/Go-template syntax, not Helm's. See config.schema.json for the field reference.
routes.title: routes

targets.description:
alertmanager:
    target: pushover
    whenExpr: 'payload.status == "firing"'
    title: '🔥 {{ .payload.commonLabels.alertname }}'
    message: '{{ .payload.commonAnnotations.summary }}'
    params: { priority: '2' }
Target (sink) definitions, keyed by name. Each is exactly one of `apprise:` or `http:`. Credentials belong in `{{ env "VAR" }}` references resolved from the environment (see `auth`/`envFrom`), never inline.
targets.title: targets

config.title: config

deploymentAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the Deployment metadata, e.g. `reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true"` to roll the pod when a referenced ConfigMap/Secret changes (recommended when using `existingConfigMap`).
deploymentAnnotations.title: deploymentAnnotations

env.description: Extra environment variables as a map (templated). Use for non-secret values referenced by `{{ env "…" }}` in targets, e.g. GOTIFY_HOST.
env.title: env

envFrom.description: Sources of environment variables (templated). The idiomatic place to inject provider credentials from your own Secret(s), e.g. `- secretRef: { name: chaski-providers }`.
envFrom.title: envFrom

extraEnv.description: Extra environment variables as a raw list (templated), e.g. valueFrom a Secret key for a single provider token.
extraEnv.title: extraEnv

fullnameOverride.description: Override the generated name used for every resource's `metadata.name` (the chart "fullname").
fullnameOverride.title: fullnameOverride

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

digest.description: Pin the image by digest (sha256:…); set by the release pipeline. When set, it overrides the tag.
digest.title: digest

tag.description: Overrides the image tag; defaults to the chart appVersion.
tag.title: tag

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries.
imagePullSecrets.title: imagePullSecrets

initContainers.description: Additional init containers (templated). A `chaski validate` init container against the mounted config is a good CI/rollout gate.
initContainers.title: initContainers

enabled.description: Create a Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor (requires its CRDs and `config.metricsEnabled`).
enabled.title: enabled

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in the `app.kubernetes.io/name` label.
nameOverride.title: nameOverride

podAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the pod. A `checksum/config` annotation is always added for the chart-managed ConfigMap so config edits roll the pod.
podAnnotations.title: podAnnotations

enabled.description: Create a PodDisruptionBudget (meaningful only with replicaCount > 1).
enabled.title: enabled

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level securityContext. chaski runs as the image's nonroot user (uid 65532); no host or elevated access is needed.
podSecurityContext.title: podSecurityContext

priorityClassName.description: PriorityClass for the pod (templated); empty uses the cluster default.
priorityClassName.title: priorityClassName

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas. chaski is stateless, so >1 is just more capacity/HA.
replicaCount.title: replicaCount

securityContext.description: Container securityContext. Drops all capabilities, read-only root filesystem, no privilege escalation.
securityContext.title: securityContext

externalTrafficPolicy.description: externalTrafficPolicy (only applied when type is not ClusterIP).
externalTrafficPolicy.title: externalTrafficPolicy

automount.description: Mount the API token. chaski never calls the Kubernetes API, so this is off by default.
automount.title: automount

name.description: ServiceAccount name; empty uses the chart fullname.
name.title: name

startupProbe.description: Startup probe (GET /healthz on the metrics port).
startupProbe.title: startupProbe

strategy.description: Deployment update strategy. RollingUpdate by default; chaski is stateless so a surge-then-drain rollout is safe.
strategy.title: strategy

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Grace period for a clean shutdown (drain).
terminationGracePeriodSeconds.title: terminationGracePeriodSeconds

repository.description: `helm test` connection-pod image; a gcr-mirrored curl, so the test never pulls from Docker Hub.
repository.title: repository

volumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts on the container (templated).
volumeMounts.title: volumeMounts
